meta.title: Foreign Investment in Africa: A Conversation with Dr. Okechukwu Enelamah
meta.description: A discussion on Nigeria’s efforts to attract foreign investment with Dr. Okechukwu Enelamah, the Minister of Industry, Trade and Investment - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
